provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, old reptilian alien with faded grey-green scales and a tall crest ridge bearing ceremonial bone carvings, cloudy amber eyes that see further than the physical world, a slow deliberate tail, wearing heavy dark robes in deep crimson and black with bronze chain links connecting the panels, a ritual blade on the belt that is symbolic not functional, bone prayer tokens hanging from the waist, bare digitigrade feet because priests walk the bare ground of the ancestors
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
